Headline: #79 79th Temporary Reroute at 79th/Essex
ShortDescription: #79 79th buses are temp. rerouted in both directions via 79th, Exchange, 83rd, Yates, then resume their normal route on 79th due to construction near 79th/Essex

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#79 79th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 79th, Exchange, 83rd, Yates, then resume their normal route on 79th.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near 79th/Essex.
